text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking around the academy after school
when I see someone dancing to music.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: One! Two! Three! Then here I...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Tuuuurn!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Oh! Sorry! I almost bumped into you!
choice_data_list: Sorry. My fault for being in the way!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
No need to apologize! I should've been paying
attention to my surroundings.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I was too focused on my finger movements and
grew careless...
choice_data_list:
It takes lots of concentration to perfect
intricate movements, huh?

It takes lots of concentration to perfect
intricate movements, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! It's a little embarrassing to admit, but I'm
not great at splitting my attention between
things...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Hm... What should I do in order to dance more
delicately, I wonder?
choice_data_list: What if you tried speeding up the song?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
You're right. There are no shortcuts to learning. I
won't improve if I don't put in the effort!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Time to dial up my practices a notch.
Thanks for the advice!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time later, I'm on my way home after
finishing my work when I see someone familiar.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey! It's you again! Are you headed home for
the day?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I'm planning to practice until right before curfew!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I feel like my hard work's paid off and I've already
improved a bit!
choice_data_list:
You're right! Your dancing does look better
now!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I may have gotten a little better, but I've
still got a long ways to go! To greater heights!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a pleasant smile, Narita Top Road returns to
her practice.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Speed up the song? What for?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Once I get used to the higher speed, playing
it at normal speed will make it feel slower and
therefore easier to follow, right?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
You're a genius! I'm going to try it right now!
Could you clap to set the tempo for me, please?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: One! Two! Three!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Eh? Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ouch... Yeah, I'm fine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe that wasn't the best idea after all. I'm
about to suggest she take it easy, but she starts
laughing before I can say anything.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! Now I really want to get it right!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure the process of learning to do this
properly will help me improve.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
It was pretty reckless of me to jump right in,
though! I think I'll focus on learning the steps first!
